label: (i)
text: any change in general United States or global economic conditions, including changes in the credit, debt, financial or capital markets (including changes in interest or exchange rates), in each case in the United States or anywhere else in the world

label: (ii)
text: any change that generally affects any of the industries or markets in which the Company and its Subsidiaries, or Parent and its Subsidiaries, as applicable, operate

label: (iii)
text: any change in political conditions (or the escalation of any such change in political conditions existing as of the date of this Agreement) or any hostilities, war, police action, acts of terrorism or natural disasters (or the escalation of any such hostilities, war, police action, acts of terrorism or natural disasters existing as of the date of this Agreement) in the United States or anywhere else in the world

label: (iv)
text: any change in applicable Law or GAAP or other applicable accounting standards (or the interpretation thereof)

label: (v)
text: any change arising from or relating to the announcement or pendency of the transactions contemplated by this Agreement, including the impact thereof on relationships, contractual or otherwise, with customers, suppliers, licensors, distributors, partners, providers and employees

label: (vi)
text: any failure by the Company or Parent, as applicable, to meet any projections, forecasts, guidance, estimates, milestones, budgets or financial or operating predictions of revenue, earnings, cash flow or cash position

label: (vii)
text: any Effect arising from or relating to the taking of any action contemplated or permitted by this Agreement or taken at the written request of Parent or the Company, as applicable

label: (viii)
text: any hurricane, tornado, flood, earthquake, tsunami, other natural disaster, pandemic (including COVID-19 or any COVID-19 Measures), epidemic, disease outbreak or other force majeure event in the United States or anywhere else in the world

label: (ix)
text: any change in the Company's stock price or the trading volume of the Company's stock, or Parent's share price or the trading volume of Parent Shares, as applicable, or any change in the credit rating of the Company or Parent, as applicable
